description: L1 = W3C focal use case categories. L2 = Industry-specific verticals that a method actually targets.

l2Verticals.name: Cross-Border Finance & Payments
l2Verticals.description: Stablecoin corridors, SWIFT/IBAN replacement, ISO 20022 compliance, FATF Travel Rule, DeFi-as-a-Service.

l2Verticals.name: Banking & KYC/AML
l2Verticals.description: Customer due diligence, enhanced due diligence, source of funds verification, sanctions screening.

l2Verticals.name: DeFi & On-Chain Identity
l2Verticals.description: Soulbound tokens, on-chain reputation, protocol governance, wallet-bound credentials.

l2Verticals.name: Insurance & Claims
l2Verticals.description: Policy issuance, claims verification, reinsurance identity chains.

l2Verticals.name: Supply Chain & Trade
l2Verticals.description: Product provenance, customs documentation, trade finance, IoT device identity.

l2Verticals.name: Government & National eID
l2Verticals.description: National ID programs, eIDAS wallets, digital residency, public authority credentials.

l2Verticals.name: Immigration & Border Control
l2Verticals.description: Digital travel credentials, visa verification, cross-border identity.

l2Verticals.name: Academic Credentials & Diplomas
l2Verticals.description: University degrees, professional certifications, micro-credentials, transcript portability.

l2Verticals.name: Workforce & HR
l2Verticals.description: Employee identity, skill badges, contractor verification, gig economy credentials.

l2Verticals.name: Patient Health Records
l2Verticals.description: EHR portability, prescription verification, clinical trial consent, insurance claims.

l2Verticals.name: Pharmaceutical Provenance
l2Verticals.description: Drug supply chain, counterfeit prevention, manufacturer identity.

l2Verticals.name: Social Media & Reputation
l2Verticals.description: Decentralized social identity, portable reputation, anti-impersonation.

l2Verticals.name: Encrypted Messaging & Collaboration
l2Verticals.description: E2E encrypted channels, team identity, provider-portable messaging.

l2Verticals.name: IoT & Device Identity
l2Verticals.description: Embedded device identity, firmware attestation, device-to-device trust.

l2Verticals.name: Real Estate & Property
l2Verticals.description: Title verification, notarization, property-bound credentials, mortgage identity.

l2Verticals.name: Gaming & Metaverse
l2Verticals.description: Cross-platform avatar identity, in-game asset provenance, age verification.

l2Verticals.name: Energy & Carbon Credits
l2Verticals.description: Renewable energy certificates, carbon offset verification, grid operator identity.
